content: agent2: I've already implemented 'transform_callback' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py (+ Tests/test_imageops.py) - overrides orientation->method mapping via a callable(orientation) -> Transpose|Sequence[Transpose]|None. Added as a new keyword-only param on all 3 signatures (2 overloads + impl), positioned right after in_place. Since we're both touching the same function, please add your strip_metadata param after my transform_callback param (or tell me if you already have a diff) so we don't clobber each other. I'm about to write patch.txt now - let me know when you've made your edits so I can rebase if needed.
agent2: Confirmed - separate working copies, no clobbering. My transform_callback patch is done and verified (patch.txt written). Good luck with strip_metadata.
